# Scale growth throughAI-powered reasoning.

Modern marketing performance is no longer limited by tools, but by the volume of manual decisions required to stay relevant. While others focus on content generation, Nova Intelligence stands apart with native reasoning that automates the decision-loop, turning strategic intent into autonomous growth.

## Multiply your team’s decision-making power.

Today, growth is capped by the number of manual decisions marketing teams can make every day. Iterable eliminates this bottleneck, transforming AI into a reasoning partner that manages complex execution so teams can focus on directing high-level strategic outcomes.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Container.png)

**Integrated,**  
**not bolted on** 

AI is built into your data and journeys — so you can act on signals without switching between systems.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Ai-Browser-Spark-Streamline-Ultimate-1.png)

**Human-led,  
AI-fueled**

Marketers define the strategy, AI manages the millions of micro-decisions required to reach it.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Single-Neutral-Focus-Streamline-Ultimate-1.png)

**Context**  
**is currency** 

Bring your customer data together so you can act on signals and respond to needs as they emerge.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/042-1.png)

**Focus on strategy,**  
**not setup**

Remove the need for manual builds, so your team can spend more time on marketing strategy.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/053.png)

**Trust**  
**by design**

Explainable AI ensures every outcome remains transparent, reliable, and governed by brand standards.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/ai-intelligence-predictive-audience.webp)

PREDICTIVE Audiences

## Anticipate needs with certainty.

Identify churn risks and high-value opportunities early with Nova Predictive Audiences, so you can act before customers disengage and secure long-term loyalty.

NOVA AGENT

## Empower strategic architects.

Reclaim strategic capacity by automating the ‘technical tax’ of campaign building. Nova agents act as autonomous partners, generating copy and handlebars logic, building journeys, and running experiments, so teams can focus on direction and strategy instead of building steps.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/ai-nova-agent.webp)

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/ai-channel-decisioning.webp)

CHANNEL DECISIONING

## Deliver relevance, automatically.

Protect your brand’s integrity with synchronized, timely interactions. Channel decisioning uses real-time context to automatically pick the optimal channel and frequency for every individual, ensuring every interaction is grounded in real time context.

## Architecture built for the shift.

Since its inception, the Iterable platform has understood that transformation technology must be able to adapt and absorb innovation.

### Architecture without friction

Eliminate data silos by processing intelligence directly within the real-time data stream.

### Decision memory

Strategic intent is transformed into a replayable system that learns and compounds value over time.

### Trust as a constraint

Glassbox AI ensures every outcome is explainable, governed by brand standards, and grounded in accuracy.
